problem id: 5cedf608
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11111110 -> 10000100
  01101111 -> 10001010
  01010100 -> 01111011
  10100111 -> 11001101
  11000110 -> 01111000
  00011010 -> 01100101
  01111100 -> 11001111
  10010000 -> 00001010
  11111101 -> 10001001
  10110110 -> 10000001

query: 10111111
predicted answer: 10100001
